message:
feat(clipboard): add bidirectional clipboard sync with on-demand host request

- Hook navigator.clipboard.readText to request clipboard from host
- Add focusin event listener to pre-fetch clipboard on focus
- Intercept paste event to inject clipboard data via execCommand
- Add version counter for reliable async clipboard updates
- Change all non-screencast CDP commands to use websockets (not pipe)
- Add debug logging for clipboard operations
